seo.title: Wkil | AI assistant for messages and social teams
seo.description: Wkil helps your business reply to messages and comments, save customer data, and prepare social content from one place in your brand voice.
seo.openGraphTitle: Wkil | AI assistant for messages and social teams
seo.openGraphDescription: Faster replies, saved customer data, and ready social content for your team from one place.

hero.eyebrow: Smart agent for social media and customer care
title: Faster replies to messages
Saved customer data
Ready content from one place
hero.subtitle: Wkil uses your business information, replies to comments and messages in your tone, and shows your team the customer details and next step clearly.
assurance: Replies are based on your business information and policies
Saves the customer name, interest, and source channel
Hands the conversation to your team when it needs a human decision

preview.label: Example conversation
preview.customerMessage: What is the price? Is delivery available in Cairo?
preview.agentText: It checks the price, delivery, and right policy before replying.
preview.replyMessage: Hi. Delivery is available in Cairo, and pricing depends on the plan that fits you. Would you like me to send the details?

results.title: Customer recorded
results.text: Channel and interest ready for the team

results.title: Defined follow-up
results.text: The team sees what to do next

prompts.title: Customer asks about pricing
prompts.customerMessage: Can I know the price and available plans?
prompts.replyMessage: Sure. Wkil plans can match your message volume and connected channels. We can recommend the right plan once we know the channels and monthly conversations you need.

results.title: Buying intent
results.text: The question is saved as pricing interest

results.title: Sales follow-up
results.text: The team can continue with the right offer

prompts.title: Customer needs WhatsApp
prompts.customerMessage: Can I connect Wkil to WhatsApp and Facebook?
prompts.replyMessage: Yes. Wkil is built to bring social conversations and communication channels into one clear flow, so your team can see messages, customers, and follow-ups from one place.

results.title: Channels identified
results.text: WhatsApp and Facebook are marked as priorities

results.title: Setup step
results.text: The team knows to start with connection

results.title: Clear expectation
results.text: The answer explains the value simply

prompts.title: Customer asks about handoff
prompts.customerMessage: If a customer asks for something sensitive, will Wkil reply alone?
prompts.replyMessage: No. You can define cases that need human review. Wkil pauses automation, gives your team the conversation context, and leaves the decision to the right person.

results.title: Decision protected
results.text: Sensitive conversations go to your team

results.title: Context preserved
results.text: The team sees the question and suggested next step

trust.title: Replies based on your data
trust.text: Wkil checks your business profile, FAQs, and policies before replying.

trust.title: Human review when needed
trust.text: If the conversation needs a decision or confirmation, it goes to your team instead of sending a random reply.

trust.title: Easier team operations
trust.text: Messages, customers, and follow-ups stay on a clear path instead of being scattered across channels.

services.title: The services that make social operations work better

items.title: Replies to messages and comments
items.text: It brings together comments, WhatsApp, and Messenger, understands the customer's question, and suggests or sends the right reply based on your settings.

items.title: Saves customers and follow-up
items.text: It records useful details like name, interest, channel, and follow-up status so your team can continue quickly.

items.title: Helps prepare social content
items.text: It turns repeated questions and customer requests into post ideas and captions ready for review.

workflow.title: From customer message to clear reply or follow-up
workflow.subtitle: Every message follows a clear path: reply, save customer, create a team task, or hand off to the right person.

steps.title: Message arrives
steps.text: Comment, direct message, WhatsApp, Messenger, or web chat.

steps.title: Wkil understands the context
steps.text: It reviews the customer's question and your business information before suggesting a reply.

steps.title: It takes the right step
steps.text: It replies, records customer details, prepares a task, or asks the team to step in.

steps.title: Your team continues with confidence
steps.text: Every conversation has a clear status and next step.

cta.title: Start with Wkil without complicated setup

footer.line: Wkil helps businesses reply faster and with confidence across social channels, while keeping customer data and follow-ups in one clear place.
